internal/storage/channels.go.one_line: Channel repository implementing CRUD operations on channels table

internal/storage/message_summaries.go.one_line: Message summary repository with upsert and unsummarized message queries

internal/storage/messages.go.one_line: Message repository with deduplication and date-based retrieval

internal/storage/migrations.go.one_line: Database migration runner with idempotent tracking and transaction support

internal/storage/migrations/001_initial..one_line: Initial database schema: channels, messages, summaries, sync_state tables

internal/storage/migrations/002_source_t.one_line: Schema evolution: adds source_type column and refactors sync_state checkpoint

internal/storage/migrations/003_nullable.one_line: Schema migration: makes telegram_id nullable for non-Telegram sources via table recreation

internal/storage/migrations/004_message_.one_line: Schema migration: creates per-message summaries table and drops legacy daily summaries

internal/storage/storage.go.one_line: Core storage interface definitions and SQLite store initialization, entry point for all persistence

internal/storage/storage_test.go.one_line: Integration tests for storage package covering channels, messages, summaries, and sync state repositories

internal/storage/syncstate.go.one_line: SyncState repository implementation with Get and Upsert methods for tracking per-channel sync progress
